target: 36. Don't Be Fooled by the Shadow
That guy was tough…
Where are Asako and Tatsuo?

Normal.
One hit with a hammer.
"If you deal the same amount of damage as a human's fatal wound to a plane, the shadow will die"…

If my sister's hypothesis was wrong…
Maybe Shiori was just unusually tough…
There weren't enough samples…

Said some weird things too.
Talking about returning home with family…

A copy…
Acting just like a real person…
Shiori said she'd "been reborn"…

"What's the difference between a perfect copy and the original"…
That was the theme of the "Masho"…
Ryunosuke-san!!!
Huh?!

He did mention "dual personality"…
Hizuru said it well.

Is that so?
Then, nice to meet you!

Ryunosuke Nagumo.
I was Hizuru's younger brother.

Um… just to confirm,
You're the one who wrote the novels… Ryunosuke-san?

Ah, no no no!!!
My sister wrote them.

We're twins, but I don't have literary talent.
My sister used my name in her pen name…

I only come out when…
My sister doesn't want to deal with people.
When I have to do interviews or meetings…

That's why I go by "Ryunosuke Nagumo".
For a long time now…

Still, Shinpei-san…
You've read my sister's books, right?

Eh?!
No, not only that…

He's an otaku!
A Nagumo otaku!

Oh?!
Is that so?

That wasn't on the recorder…
It's probably my sister's embarrassment.

If you say anything extra,
Hizuru will get angry.

Haha, that's true.
From now on, I'll leave it to my sister.
Don't misinterpret anything.
Huh…?
I'm not blushing, and I'm not hiding anything!

Things that don't need to be told…
I just cut them out!!
S…sir…?

(If I undo my hair,
I'll go back to Hizuru's personality…)

Going back to the "Masho" talk earlier…
Don't let the shadow's appearance and words move you, Shinpei.

Even if they appear as friends or family…
Or someone you love,
You mustn't hesitate.

There's no time…
Philosophizing about the identity of copies and originals
Can wait until everything is over.

The Kobayakawa family was too late… but
You still have a chance.
You really… can you kill Mio?
We'll wait outside until time's up…
Understood.

Ah, right…
Let's exchange contact info.
If anything different happens,
Tell me.

Do your best to live as normally as before,
And observe the situation.
You are the "Observer".
…Yes!!
(Do my best to live normally…)

(Things like the Kobayakawa family,
Shiori's injured left arm from when I suppressed her shadow,
Are all different already…)
/translate
